creator: alex@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

Very useful submission, thanks. 

I received several comments from Udo Erdelhoff <ue@nathan.ruhr.de>, 
and it seems, that some parts are not quite correct. 

Also, Udo added some very nice information about netgroups, which I'll 
add, too. 

However, Nik said, that I should merge these bits into the current handbook. 

So, work is in progress.
